message:
feat(apple-notes): expand test coverage and implement ConnectorErrorMapping

Client tests:
- Extract shared test_client() and test_client_no_folder() helpers to
  reduce boilerplate across all test functions.
- Add coverage for list_notes_invocation with folder override and
  no-folder fallback, search_notes_invocation query passthrough,
  get_note_invocation ID passthrough, create_note_invocation with
  explicit folder / default folder / no folder, and multiline body
  parsing edge cases.

Error mapping:
- Implement ConnectorErrorMapping trait for AppleNotesError, mapping
  Timeout to Process, Cancelled to Process, and delegating to the
  existing to_fcp_error() method for downstream FCP error propagation.
- Add is_retryable() const method (always false for local process
  errors since osascript calls are not idempotent network requests).
- Add unit tests verifying Config to InvalidRequest, UnsupportedPlatform
  to ConnectorUnavailable, Process to Internal FCP error mapping.

Types:
- Add serde derives and display formatting for Apple Notes domain types
  used in structured test assertions and JSON artifact snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
